generated_oml:
// C2: Physical Acting Components
instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical steering servo actuation component for vehicle direction control, interfaced with the Vedder Electronic Speed Controller via ROS2 topics for real-time steering commands"
]

instance MotorVoltageController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Motor actuation system converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle chassis, interfaced with the Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance SpeedController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Electronic Speed Controller (Vedder model) managing vehicle speed control for the physical twin chassis, directly interfaced with motor drivers"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing 3D object detection for the physical twin vehicle, generating point clouds for environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PointCloudData
]

instance DepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera providing environmental context visualization for the physical twin vehicle, generating depth maps and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthMapData
]

instance EgoVehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collection of sensors measuring real-time ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) for adaptive cruise control operations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction Data Streams
instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance DepthMapData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleStateSensor
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterFE
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData PointCloudData, DepthMapData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterFE
]

instance EgoVehicleMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingFE
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance RealTimeEgoVehicleStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Real-time state model tracking ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and position for adaptive cruise control operations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
]

instance ObjectTrackModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D object tracking model generated from point cloud clustering and Kalman filtering for ACC perception"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
]

instance DrivingPathProjectionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model projecting current driving path based on ego vehicle state and object tracks for real-time visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationFE
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware facilitating component communication between physical twin sensors, processing components, and digital twin entity"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, DataPreProcessingFE, KalmanFilterFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK enabling development on Jetson Orin Nano for complex perception and control processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, KalmanFilterFE, VisualizationFE
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 environment supporting rapid prototyping of data processing and control logic components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, ControlPanelFE
]

instance ROS2Packages : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 packages implementing ISO 23247 Feature Engineering components for modular digital twin implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, DataPreProcessingFE, KalmanFilterFE, VisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE
]

instance WiFiCommunication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi communication protocol enabling real-time data transfer between physical twin sensors and digital twin entity"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

// C12: Feature Engineering Components (FE)
instance DBSCANClusteringFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering component processing point cloud data to generate object tracks from raw sensor measurements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:outputTo ProcessedObjectTracks
]

instance KalmanFilterFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Kalman filter component processing object tracks and ego vehicle state for robust perception and control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessedObjectTracks, VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:outputTo ProcessedObjectTracks
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Data pre-processing feature engineering component preparing sensor data for ISO 23247 compliance and real-time transmission"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudData, DepthMapData, VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:outputTo ProcessedObjectTracks, EgoVehicleMetrics
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Data translation feature engineering component serializing processed data according to ISO 23247 standard for inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessedObjectTracks, EgoVehicleMetrics
    DTDFVocab:outputTo ProcessedObjectTracks, EgoVehicleMetrics
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Data collection feature engineering component gathering and storing real-time state data for digital twin models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessedObjectTracks, EgoVehicleMetrics
    DTDFVocab:outputTo RealTimeEgoVehicleStateModel, ObjectTrackModel
]

instance VisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "3D visualization feature engineering component generating interactive visualizations of driving path and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DrivingPathProjectionModel, RealTimeEgoVehicleStateModel
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Control panel feature engineering component enabling remote management of adaptive cruise control operations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EgoVehicleMetrics
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Reporting feature engineering component generating timeseries performance reports from processed data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessedObjectTracks, EgoVehicleMetrics
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring service providing visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D visualization components"
    DTDFVocab:provides UserVisualization
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading service executing adaptive cruise control logic off-board on cloud/edge hardware, freeing on-vehicle ECUs"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management service enabling emergency braking, speed adjustments, and ACC activation/deactivation via control panel interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakeAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance UserVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization insight providing interactive 3D display of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path for performance analysis"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adaptive cruise control action executing speed and steering commands based on processed perception data and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking action triggered remotely to prevent collisions, immediately stopping the vehicle when critical conditions detected"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Speed adjustment action enabling remote modification of desired cruise control speed for ACC optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C18: Environment Components
instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SteeringServoActuator, MotorVoltageController, SpeedController, LiDARSensor, DepthCamera, EgoVehicleStateSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEntityEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataTranslationFE, DataPreProcessingFE, KalmanFilterFE, VisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE, ReportingFE
]

// C19: System Components
instance PhysicalTwinChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle chassis hosting both lower-level steering/speed control and upper-level autonomy components"
    base:contains SteeringServoActuator, SpeedController, MotorVoltageController
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer hosting perception and control processing components for the physical twin"
    base:contains DBSCANClusteringFE, KalmanFilterFE, DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized physical twin entity combining both lower-level chassis and upper-level autonomy components for real-time ACC operations"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinChassis, JetsonOrinNano, LiDARSensor, DepthCamera, EgoVehicleStateSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge deployment hosting the digital twin's ACC controlling and data translation components for remote management"
    base:contains DataTranslationFE, DataPreProcessingFE, KalmanFilterFE, VisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE, ReportingFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction occurs via the **Actuation FE** (converting desired speed commands into motor voltage) and **Control Panel FE** (sending emergency braking or ACC enable/disable commands). The DT Entity’s **Controlling FE** computes ACC logic (lead vehicle detection, speed adjustment) and forwards commands to the Physical Twin Entity’s **Actuation FE**, which executes them on the vehicle’s motor and steering servo. The system ensures ≤100 ms end-to-end latency for real-time control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates at **real-time granularity**, with critical operations (e.g., ACC control loops) synchronized to ≤100 ms latency. The system mandates **100 ms clock synchronization accuracy** between devices for event ordering and data integrity, aligning with 3GPP V2V communication standards. The DT processes data at sensor-specific rates (e.g., LiDAR point clouds at high frequency), but exact rates are not specified beyond real-time requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of three primary entities: **Physical Twin Entity** (hosts sensors/actuators and data pre-processing), **Digital Twin Entity** (executes ACC logic, data collection, and reporting), and **User Entity** (3D Visualization and Control Panel). The **Cross-System Entity** (Data Translation FE) ensures interoperability between entities. The architecture is **centralized**, with minimal horizontal integration (e.g., no external DTs)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used for **cyber-physical experimentation** and validation of ACC requirements (e.g., ISO 15622 compliance) via simulation and 3D virtualization (generalized from background context).
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: The PT is **retrofitted** with autonomy components (LiDAR, Jetson devices) to enable DT integration.
  - **Operational Phase**: The DT supports **real-time monitoring, remote management, and computation offloading** during vehicle operation. The system is deployed as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop**, enabling operators to intervene remotely."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured through **real-time data synchronization** (≤100 ms latency) and **clock synchronization** (100 ms accuracy). Validation mechanisms include **ISO 15622 compliance** for ACC performance, **verification of sensor data processing** (DBSCAN/Kalman filter), and **user feedback** via remote management. Uncertainty is mitigated by **external data storage** (SQL database) and **report generation** for post-operation analysis. No explicit uncertainty quantification is provided."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses **ROS2 network** for intra-entity communication and **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity (vehicle-to-DT) communication. The system mandates **≤100 ms end-to-end latency** (3GPP V2V standard) and **100 ms clock synchronization** for distributed systems. Data serialization is handled by the **Data Translation FE** (ISO 23247), ensuring unit consistency across streams. Protocols include ROS2 topics for sensor data and custom Wi-Fi messages for control commands."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **hybrid architecture**: the **Physical Twin Entity** runs on the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle (Jetson Orin Nano + ROS2), while the **Digital Twin Entity** and **User Entity** are hosted on external cloud/edge infrastructure. The **Data Storage** component resides externally (SQL database) to accommodate large real-time datasets. Deployment follows ISO 23247’s entity-based structure, with each FE implemented as a ROS2 package."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is **minimal**; the DT primarily interacts with the physical twin and external databases (SQL). No integration with other DTs or external systems (e.g., fleet management platforms) is documented. The system focuses on **closed-loop ACC control** and **real-time monitoring**, with no cross-DT coordination features."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **ISO 23247** (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, Part 2) for architecture and ISO 15622 for ACC compliance. The system uses **ROS2** (Robot Operating System 2) for middleware, **OPC UA** (potential future extension), and **Wi-Fi** for communication. The architecture deviates from ISO 23247 by introducing a **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard) and splitting the User Interface FE into visualization and control panel components."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety and security are addressed through:
  - **Safety**: Compliance with **ISO 15622** for ACC actuation, ensuring deterministic control and human-in-the-loop (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin).
  - **Synchronization**: ±100 ms clock accuracy prevents timing attacks and ensures data integrity.
  - **Latency constraints**: ≤ **100 ms** latency prevents malicious interference in real-time control loops.
  - **No explicit security protocols**: Not detailed in the document (e.g., encryption, access controls)."
]
